# BAA Execution Register

Records every BAA executed between Wiseman Financial Technologies, LLC and a subprocessor receiving PHI flow. Each entry must be backed by a counsel-reviewed BAA on file (Phase 42.6F / LOCK-42.6.4 mandatory).

## Entry Template

### [YYYY-MM-DD] — [Vendor legal name] BAA executed

- **Subprocessor ID:** [matches SUBPROCESSOR_INVENTORY.json]
- **Vendor legal name:** [legal entity]
- **Counsel reviewer:** [HIPAA counsel name + bar admission]
- **Effective date:** [YYYY-MM-DD]
- **Expiration date:** [YYYY-MM-DD or "auto-renewal until terminated"]
- **Document reference:** [file path or external reference]
- **Spine-enforced non-PHI path (if applicable):** [Y/N; if Y, D0 proof reference]
- **SOC 2 report cadence agreed:** [annual / biennial / none]
- **Annual review schedule:** [next review YYYY-MM-DD]
- **SUBPROCESSOR_INVENTORY.json updated:** [Y/N; commit hash]

(No entries yet at 42.5U commit. First entries expected at Phase 42.6F counsel review.)
